title: How this product became AMAZON Bestseller for 5 years!
description:
👉India’s first ‘learn by doing’ experience for growing your wealth. Imagine being able to build your own personal finance plan while attending a class, live. Apply to this upcoming FREE class this week here on Zerodha Varsity: https://openinapp.link/tsje3

👉VIDEO INTRODUCTION:

 Manish Chowdhary (Co-founder of WOW Skin Science) saw the apple cider vinegar trend early and focused on improving the process. Longer fermentation, higher quality inputs, and an online-first launch on Amazon turned it into a long-running bestseller.

To know more such insights, watch the full episode on Think School Hindi by Zero1.
